pageContext.name: Ghostbusters Power Idolz
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Numskull are proud to present the Ghostbusters Power Idolz Wireless Charger!   It's time to call the Ghostbusters! It looks like mischievous ghosts have possessed your retro VHS of the paranormal cult classic as it has grown arms and legs. It's a bonus that it's gained the ability to charge your devices wirelessly. This is officially part of the Power Idolz range, a collectible series of wireless charging docks with designs based on retro packaging of your favorite movies, TV shows, and video games.   Add to your geeky collection and bag yourself this awesome, high-quality collectible series of wireless charging docks!
